title: hephaestus-character-sheet-boardanchor-2k
prompt:
A character model sheet / animation turntable, on a clean plain white studio background.

SUBJECT — the reference image shows HEPHAESTUS, the smith. Reproduce THIS exact character as a multi-angle turntable. Design spec (match exactly):
- Age: late 40s to early 50s, weary.
- Face: angular, blocky, with a strong squared jaw, heavy straight brow, a long prominent nose, small downcast blue eyes, hollow cheeks; somber, weary, tender expression.
- Hair: mustard-yellow / warm blonde, thick geometric swept-back chunks that flare slightly at the sides and end above the collar.
- Beard: SHORT, neatly trimmed, squared-off, PALE GREYISH-WHITE (contrasting the yellow hair), covering chin and jawline — NO mustache.
- Build: broad thick neck, heavy muscular shoulders; weary, slightly hunched posture, head carried a little down and forward.
- Garment: a coarse off-white, heavy-weight tunic/toga draped over the LEFT shoulder in deep vertical folds, the right shoulder and chest bare; no belt or fasteners.
- Complexion: fair skin with pink and purple mid-tones, cool grey-blue shadows.
Keep his exact face, hair, beard, build and costume identical across every view.

LAYOUT — a multi-angle turntable spread, evenly and identically lit across all views:
- full-body FRONT view
- full-body THREE-QUARTER FRONT view
- full-body BACK view
plus two detail callout panels: a head-and-shoulders FACE close-up, and a close-up of the tunic drape over the left shoulder.

STYLE — painterly cinematic concept-art rendering matching the reference's medium and palette. NOT photoreal, NOT a flat line drawing.

Clean white background, no environment, no other characters. The reference shows him from the chest up — invent his lower body and stance consistently in the same style, standing naturally (no visible disability needed for this sheet). 16:9 aspect ratio.
